levels.name: Prose-only methodology
levels.definition: A concept is described in human-readable form only.

levels.name: Structured artifact
levels.definition: A concept is represented as a structured artifact, such as JSON, Markdown sections, registry-like prose, or tabular form.
what_this_proves: The concept can be represented in a consistent structure.
levels.boundary_rule: Structured artifact is not schema-defined artifact.
allowed_claims: The concept has a structured representation.
disallowed_claims: The artifact conforms to a schema.
The artifact has been locally validated.

levels.name: Schema-defined artifact
levels.definition: A structured artifact has an explicit schema that defines required fields, allowed values, and expected shape.
what_this_proves: The artifact has a declared machine-readable shape.
levels.boundary_rule: Schema definition is not validation execution.
allowed_claims: The artifact has a declared schema.
The artifact has a machine-readable shape.

levels.name: Local validator
levels.definition: A local script validates a structured artifact against declared expectations.
what_this_proves: The artifact can be checked locally.
levels.boundary_rule: A local validator is not a local pipeline.
allowed_claims: The artifact can be checked locally.

levels.name: Local pipeline
levels.definition: Multiple validators or local steps are chained into a repeatable local sequence.
what_this_proves: A set of related artifacts can be validated together locally.
levels.boundary_rule: A local pipeline is not a combined local suite.
allowed_claims: Related artifacts can be validated together locally.
disallowed_claims: The architecture is validated as a whole.

levels.name: Combined local suite
levels.definition: Multiple accepted local pipelines are run through one repeatable local command.
what_this_proves: The current local architecture can be validated as a whole.
levels.boundary_rule: A combined local suite is not CI enforcement.
allowed_claims: GFC has a combined local validation suite.
GFC can locally validate the current evidence-handling architecture.

levels.name: CI-enforced suite
levels.definition: The combined validation suite runs automatically in continuous integration.
what_this_proves: The validation suite can be executed automatically during repository change workflows.
levels.boundary_rule: CI enforcement is not runtime enforcement.

levels.name: Runtime-consumed registry
levels.definition: A runtime system reads a registry, schema, or validation artifact during operation.
what_this_proves: Runtime code can consume accepted validation artifacts.
levels.boundary_rule: Runtime consumption is not runtime enforcement.
allowed_claims: Runtime code can consume the registry.

levels.name: Runtime boundary enforcement
levels.definition: A runtime system uses accepted registries and boundary rules to alter behavior.
what_this_proves: Runtime behavior is affected by accepted GFC boundary artifacts.
levels.boundary_rule: Runtime boundary enforcement is not domain-specific authority integration.
allowed_claims: Runtime behavior enforces declared GFC boundary rules.
disallowed_claims: Runtime enforcement establishes medical, legal, scientific, or institutional adequacy.

levels.name: Domain-specific authority integration
levels.definition: GFC integrates domain-specific authority standards, thresholds, review criteria, or external evidence requirements for a declared domain.
what_this_proves: GFC has declared domain-specific criteria for authority handling.
what_this_does_not_prove: final institutional legitimacy without actual institutional acceptance
levels.boundary_rule: Domain-specific authority integration is scoped, not universal.
allowed_claims: GFC has scoped domain-specific authority criteria for a declared domain.
disallowed_claims: GFC has final institutional legitimacy without actual institutional acceptance.

anti_inflation_note: Validation maturity must not be inflated into CI enforcement, runtime enforcement, external proof, institutional authority, domain-specific warrant, or universal truth.
boundary_note: A lower maturity level must not claim the powers of a higher maturity level.
current_capability_note: Current GFC maturity is Level 6: Combined local suite.
not_yet_achieved_note: GFC has not yet achieved CI enforcement, runtime-consumed registry, runtime boundary enforcement, or domain-specific authority integration.
